title: ClassifyAxisPreflightReport
description:
Output ``data`` block for ``classify-axis-preflight`` (WS5 #6).

Wraps inside the standard SuccessEnvelope's ``data`` field (see
envelope.json). Carries one ``SubResult`` per sub-call plus the overall
verdict derived from them. The ``recall`` sub-call appears as ``null``
when it was skipped (caller supplied data_axis, or the cache-check hit)
so consumers can still introspect shape uniformly.

overall.title: Overall
overall.description: ``fail`` if any sub-call that ran returned ``ok: false``; else ``pass``. The skipped recall slot does not count (it is ``null``, not a failure). Mirror of status-preflight's simpler binary verdict.

SubResult.description: One sub-call's outcome — verbatim envelope + elapsed wall-clock + ``ok`` mirror. A skipped sub-call (recall when the cache hit or the caller supplied data_axis) shows as ``null`` at the parent (not a SubResult with ``ok: false``) so a re-run can target only the missing piece. The cache-check sub-call's envelope carries ``data.hit`` (bool) plus the stored / current run_signature_sha that the hit decision compared.
SubResult.title: SubResult
